errors.orderNotVnpay: This order is not configured for VNPay payment.
errors.orderAlreadyPaid: This order has already been paid.
errors.createPaymentUrlFailed: Failed to create the VNPay payment URL.
errors.orderNotPaid: This order has not been paid, so it cannot be refunded.
errors.overRefund: Refund amount exceeds the remaining collected amount.
errors.gatewayFailed: The payment gateway rejected the refund transaction.
errors.refundAlreadyInProgress: A refund for this order is already being processed.
errors.refundInProgress: The gateway reports that this refund is still being processed.
errors.refundNotEligible: The original transaction is not eligible for gateway refund.
errors.missingRequiredFields: Missing required fields: amount, type, method, reason.
